targets.rawSql:
select d.CollectDate as time, isnull(z.cnt,0) as cnt
  from (select distinct dtm.CollectDate
             , i.InstanceID
          from TBL2_M_WhoIsActive dtm, META2_M_InstanceInfo i (nolock)
         where i.InstanceID = dtm.InstanceID
           and dtm.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
           and i.ServerName = ${ServerName:singlequote}
       ) d
left outer join 
       (select CollectDate, w.InstanceID
             , count(distinct w.session_id) as cnt
          from META2_M_InstanceInfo i (nolock), TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w (nolock)
         where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
           and w.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
           and w.blocking_session_id > 0
           and i.ServerName = ${ServerName:singlequote}
        group by w.CollectDate, w.InstanceID
       ) z 
      on d.InstanceID = z.InstanceID
     and d.CollectDate = z.CollectDate
 where d.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
order by time

select convert(char(23),z.CollectDate,21) as CollectDate, isnull(z.cnt,0) as cnt
  from (select CollectDate, w.InstanceID
             , count(distinct w.session_id) as cnt
          from META2_M_InstanceInfo i (nolock), TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w (nolock)
         where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
           and w.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
           and w.blocking_session_id > 0
           and i.ServerName = ${ServerName:singlequote}
        group by w.CollectDate, w.InstanceID
       ) z 
order by CollectDate DESC

panels.title: Lock count table in time range

targets.rawSql:
with data_set as (
select session_id, case when blocking_session_id = session_id then null else blocking_session_id end blocking_session_id, lock_status 
  from (select w.session_id, case when w.blocking_session_id = 0 then null else  w.blocking_session_id end blocking_session_id, 
               '[' + convert(varchar,w.session_id) + ': ' + status +'] ' +  wait_info as lock_status
            -- , w.total_elapsed_time as elapsed_time
             , row_number() over(partition by w.CollectDate, w.session_id, w.blocking_session_id order by w.total_elapsed_time desc) rnk
         from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock), TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w with (nolock)
        where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
          and sql_text <> 'sp_server_diagnostics'
          and i.ServerName IN (${ServerName:singlequote})
          and CollectDate = ${CollectDate:singlequote}
       ) z
 where rnk = 1
 ) 
select session_id
     , (select session_id from data_set c  with (nolock) where a.blocking_session_id = c.session_id) blocking_session_id
     , lock_status
 from data_set a

with data_set as (
select session_id, case when blocking_session_id = session_id then null else blocking_session_id end blocking_session_id, sql_text 
  from (select w.session_id, case when w.blocking_session_id = 0 then null else  w.blocking_session_id end blocking_session_id, 
               '[' + convert(varchar,w.session_id) + '] ' + case when w.ObjectName= '' then w.sql_text 
                    else  + w.ObjectName 
                end sql_text
            -- , w.total_elapsed_time as elapsed_time
             , row_number() over(partition by w.CollectDate, w.session_id, w.blocking_session_id order by w.total_elapsed_time desc) rnk
         from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock), TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w with (nolock)
        where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
          and sql_text <> 'sp_server_diagnostics'
          and i.ServerName IN (${ServerName:singlequote})
          and CollectDate = ${CollectDate:singlequote}
       ) z
 where rnk = 1
 ) 
select session_id
     , (select session_id from data_set c  with (nolock) where a.blocking_session_id = c.session_id) blocking_session_id
     , sql_text
 from data_set a

select column_name, column_value from (
select *
  from (select convert(nvarchar(4000),session_id)                   as session_id
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),tran_start_time, 121)         as tran_start_time
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),total_elapsed_time)           as total_elapsed_time
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),login_name)                   as login_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),host_name)                    as host_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),open_tran_count)              as open_tran_count
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),transaction_isolation_level)  as transaction_isolation_level
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),program_name)                 as program_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),wait_info)                    as wait_info
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),cpu)                          as cpu
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),reads)                        as reads
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),tempdb_allocations)           as tempdb_allocations
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),physical_reads)               as physical_reads
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),case when objectname = ''  then sql_text else objectname end) as sql_text
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),query_hash, 1)                as query_hash
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),query_plan_hash, 1)           as query_plan_hash
             , ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by session_id order by total_elapsed_time desc) rnk
           from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
              , TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w with (nolock)
          where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
            and sql_text <> 'sp_server_diagnostics'
            and i.ServerName = ${ServerName:singlequote}
            and CollectDate = ${CollectDate:singlequote}
            and w.session_id = ${session_id}
       ) z
 where rnk = 1
 ) z
  unpivot(column_value for column_name in  (session_id, tran_start_time, total_elapsed_time, login_name, host_name, program_name,
                                     open_tran_count, transaction_isolation_level, wait_info, cpu, reads, tempdb_allocations,
                                     physical_reads, sql_text, query_hash, query_plan_hash)) as unp

select link_session_id, column_name, column_value from (
select *
  from (select convert(nvarchar(4000),b.session_id)                   as link_session_id
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.session_id)                   as session_id
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.tran_start_time, 121)         as tran_start_time
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.total_elapsed_time)           as total_elapsed_time
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.login_name)                   as login_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.host_name)                    as host_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.open_tran_count)              as open_tran_count
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.transaction_isolation_level)  as transaction_isolation_level
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.program_name)                 as program_name
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.wait_info)                    as wait_info
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.cpu)                          as cpu
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.reads)                        as reads
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.tempdb_allocations)           as tempdb_allocations
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.physical_reads)               as physical_reads
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),case when b.objectname = ''  then b.sql_text else b.objectname end) as sql_text
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.query_hash, 1)                as query_hash
             , convert(nvarchar(4000),b.query_plan_hash, 1)           as query_plan_hash
             , ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by b.session_id order by b.total_elapsed_time desc) rnk
           from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
              , TBL2_M_WhoIsActive w
              , TBL2_M_WhoIsActive b
          where i.InstanceID = w.InstanceID
            and w.sql_text <> 'sp_server_diagnostics'
            and b.sql_text <> 'sp_server_diagnostics'
            and i.ServerName = ${ServerName:singlequote}
            and w.CollectDate = ${CollectDate:singlequote}
            and b.CollectDate = ${CollectDate:singlequote}
            and w.session_id = ${session_id}
            and i.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
            and w.blocking_session_id = b.session_id
       ) z
 where rnk = 1
 ) z
  unpivot(column_value for column_name in  (session_id, tran_start_time, total_elapsed_time, login_name, host_name, program_name,
                                     open_tran_count, transaction_isolation_level, wait_info, cpu, reads, tempdb_allocations,
                                     physical_reads, sql_text, query_hash, query_plan_hash)) as unp
